headline: Wells Fargo Reinstates Equal-Weight on Universal Health Services, Announces $165 Price Target
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Stephen Baxter   reinstates Universal Health Services (NYSE:UHS) with a Equal-Weight and announces $165 price target.
